content_body:
Here in Blue Ridge, GA as the weather warms up offering sunny days, the landscape is bursting forth with the neon greens of springtime. After hibernating during this extremely long winter season, many are dreaming of getting out in the sunshine...maybe exploring a new place or a much-beloved place. Blue Ridge is just that special spot in the world to explore and to be energized. Cabin Rentals of Georgia would like to help make your excursion delightfully effortless. Let us help you find the perfect mountain Blue Ridge cabin close to all the activities you are excited to experience and explore. 

A Blue Ridge Cabin That Fits Your Style

Whether you want a cozy Blue Ridge cabin for two, a cabin to accommodate your family, or a luxury lodge for a couples' retreat, we at Cabin Rentals of Georgia have just the perfect size and style for you! Ranging from rustic elegance to sophisticated luxury, we have just what you are looking for. Even though we are a small boutique Blue Ridge cabin rental company, all of our luxury cabins are hand-picked for their special uniqueness, design, and locale. Water views from afar or on a creek, river, or lake are sure to delight everyone.  Several Blue Ridge cabins such as Crooked Creek Cabin, Blue Ridge Lake Cottage, or Royal Mountain Lodge will fit that bill to energize and mesmerize! Our mountain view cabins such as Sky High Lodge, Bella Vista Lodge, and Skydance will take your breath away and help you feel as though you are a million miles away from the cares of the world.

Explore and Experience Blue Ridge

Whether you want to revel in the peacefulness of your Blue Ridge cabin rental or be close to all the action and experience everything, several cabins will fit that bill! Aska Escape Lodge located within walking distance of the Lilly Pad Village is perfect for families; Aska Adventure Outpost is ideal for those who want to mountain bike and hike on the Aska Trails or rent a tube/kayak on the Toccoa River; Riverview Lodge, Fallen Timber Lodge, Outlaw Ridge, Mayfly Lodge and Treehouse, and A Rolling River are 30 minutes away from worldclass whitewater rafting on Class II-IV rapids and less than 15 minutes from Historic Downtown Blue Ridge. 

If you would like to explore outside of Blue Ridge, we offer three  cabins right on the Hiwassee River in Murphy, NC - a beautiful 30 minute drive north of Blue Ridge. You are within 15 minutes of quaint antique and boutique shops in Downtown Murphy, Harrah's Cherokee Casino, and John Campbell's Folk School.  During the summer months, Nantahala Outdoor Center offers awesome whitewater rafting and a breathaking mountain/river experiece. We love Murphy and it's family-friendly vibe, and know you will too.

Blue Ridge Cabin Bells And Whistles

Each Blue Ridge cabin rental is beautifully appointed with luxurious furniture and decor. Depending on the cabin, locale, setting, and amenities, Cabin Rentals of Georgia offers first class amenities that please even the most discerning guest. In our portfolio of luxury homes, you can find some of the following amenities:

  • Outdoor Grill
  • Al fresco Dining, Porch Swings, Rockers
  • Hot tub
  • Washer and Dryer laundry supplies
  • TV and DVD Player
  • Billiards, Foosball, Pinball Machines, Board Games, DVD Library, Book Library
  • Outdoor Fireplace
  • Private Boat Dock
  • Riverside Gazebo, Picnic Tables, Firepits, Horseshoes
  • Grand Piano

Book Now and Experience Blue Ridge!

Once you have narrowed down your choices for the most ideal Blue Ridge cabin rental for your party, you have the opportunity to book online or better yet ~ talk to one our friendly reservation specialists, who are local experts and can help you make that final decision if you're just not sure which cabin to book. We can help you plan your activities and point you to our favorite haunts.

The Blue Ridge mountains are calling....and you must come!
title: Finding Your Perfect Blue Ridge Cabin
